creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/7/zpool-features.7.html#Compatibility_feature_sets>: 

> The requested features are applied when a pool is created using zpool 
> create -o compatibility=… and controls 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current> and (pre-release) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=zpool-features&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD+13.1-RELEASE> appear to break with that sentence: 

* misrepresentation of the `…`
* then endless italics

> The requested features are	applied	when a pool is created using zpool
>      create -o compatibility=_a|	and controls
